channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: With the second-gen Ring Battery Video Doorbell Plus, the head-to-toe doorbell finally goes 2K
item.description: The latest version of Ring's wireless video doorbell is a big step up rather than a minor refresh, and a great pick if you're not put off by the subscription fee.

item.title: Kindle Unlimited costs $11.99 per month, but here's how to pay less
item.description: Here are some ways you can get a Kindle Unlimited membership at a discounted price.

item.title: China may have accessed Mythos
item.description: According to a new report from Semafor, the White House's decision to impose export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos was driven in part by fears that it had been accessed by a group linked to China. If the Chinese government actually had access to Mythos 5 or Fable 5, it would present a serious national security […]

item.title: Apple reportedly has three more iOS 27 features coming in the fall
item.description: Apple is still holding some of its iOS 27 cards close to its chest.

item.title: UFC White House live stream: how to watch Topuria vs Gaethje, start time, preview, full card
item.description: Freedom 250 event features two titles up for grabs – follow our guide to live stream UFC White House online and watch Topuria vs Gaethje and Pereira vs Gane.

item.title: How to watch Spain vs. Cape Verde online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Spain vs. Cape Verde in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: How to watch Netherlands vs. Japan online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Netherlands vs. Japan in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: Moins de 600 € pour un laptop Asus avec écran OLED et SSD de 1 To : une super offre pour la rentrée
item.description: L'Asus VivoBook 16 OLED (M1605) est un laptop équilibré qui profite d'une belle remise chez Cdiscount : son prix passe de 699 euros à seulement 599 euros. Parfait pour préparer la rentrée 2026.
